dict.string: Connect to nearby accessories when an Oxide app enables Bluetooth features.
Capture camera frames when an Oxide app enables camera features.
Access contacts when an Oxide app enables contacts features.
Use location when an Oxide app enables location-aware features.
Use location when an Oxide app enables location-aware features.
Use location when an Oxide app enables location-aware features.
Capture audio when an Oxide app enables recording features.
Read motion and pressure data when an Oxide app enables motion features.
Access media assets when an Oxide app enables media-library features.
